scripts.build:deps: pnpm --filter @sentinel/shared build && pnpm --filter @sentinel/providers build && pnpm --filter @sentinel/mcp build && pnpm --filter @sentinel/core build && pnpm --filter @sentinel/tools build && pnpm --filter @sentinel/sdk build && pnpm --filter @sentinel/server build && pnpm --filter @sentinel/tui build && pnpm --filter @sentinel/cli build
scripts.build:prod: pnpm --filter @sentinel/shared build && pnpm --filter @sentinel/providers build && pnpm --filter @sentinel/mcp build && pnpm --filter @sentinel/core build && pnpm --filter @sentinel/tools build && pnpm --filter @sentinel/sdk build && pnpm --filter @sentinel/server build && pnpm --filter @sentinel/tui build && pnpm --filter @sentinel/cli build:prod
scripts.build:clean: find packages apps -name '*.tsbuildinfo' -delete 2>/dev/null; pnpm -r exec rm -rf dist && pnpm build
